subcodes.first_line: O Qasim! Hearken thou unto the call of the Wronged One, for verily He summoneth thee and maketh mention of thee, that thou mayest arise to serve the Cause of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قاسم ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه ینادیک و یذکرک لتقوم علی خدمة امر ربک
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @methods of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
